body:
## Summary

A complete, **review-only** Commercial Launch Operating System for the Saudi/GCC B2B market, now spanning **outreach + social/media + website**. It generates daily opportunities, classifies them, writes high-quality bilingual drafts, runs them through quality + compliance + safety gates, and places them in a **Founder Review Queue**.

> ⚠️ **The system never sends or posts anything externally.** No SMTP, no API send, no social auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets. The founder reviews and publishes every message manually.

## First 5 verticals
1. Facilities Management & Maintenance — إدارة المرافق والصيانة
2. Contracting & Project Controls — المقاولات وضبط المشاريع
3. Real Estate & Property Operations — العقار وإدارة الأملاك
4. Legal & Professional Services — المكاتب القانونية والخدمات المهنية
5. Consulting, Training & B2B Services — الاستشارات والتدريب وخدمات B2B

Each ships a full playbook (ICP, personas, titles, pain map, offer angle, entry/pilot/retainer offers, proof asset, AR+EN messaging, objections, qualification/disqualification, compliance notes, delivery promise, success metrics, sample drafts).

## Draft factory output (outreach)
```
python scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py --target 400
→ accepted=478  rejected=0  target=400  safety_passed=True
```
175 cold email + 100 follow-up + 75 LinkedIn manual + 50 website form = **400 minimum** (478 produced), bilingual, avg quality/compliance 100/100.

## Social & Media OS (review-only)
```
python scripts/commercial_social_factory.py
→ accepted=136  rejected=0  min=80  safety_passed=True
```
8 platforms — LinkedIn, X, Instagram, newsletter, blog outline, **Google/Meta ad copy (no spend)**, PR pitch — across 6 content pillars, bilingual. Every post: `post_allowed=false / external_post_blocked=true / requires_founder_approval=true / no_ad_spend=true`.

## Website
Best-in-class bilingual `apps/web/app/commercial-launch/page.tsx` on the existing Navy+Gold design system: hero + stats, 5 verticals, SAR offer ladder, daily-loop steps, Social/Media OS section, trust-first/approval-first, FAQ, CTA. `npm run verify` (typecheck + build) ✅.

## Safety guarantees
- Every outreach draft and social post is review-only by construction.
- Safety audit fails on any active send/post/automation/scraping code, any scheduling API, `send_allowed=true`, `external_send_blocked=false`, `post_allowed=true`, or `external_post_blocked=false`.
- Offer ladder (SAR) with a **no-guaranteed-ROI**, conservative claims policy.
- GitHub Actions workflow: daily schedule + dispatch, **no secrets**, read-only perms, artifacts only, runs both factories + safety + readiness + tests.

## Tests run
```
pytest -q --noconftest -p no:cacheprovider \
  tests/test_commercial_generate_400_drafts.py \
  tests/test_commercial_safety_audit.py \
  tests/test_commercial_launch_readiness.py \
  tests/test_commercial_no_external_send.py \
  tests/test_commercial_social_factory.py
→ 41 passed
```
Readiness gate: **9/9 checks PASS**. `make env-check` ✅. CodeQL unused-import/variable findings fixed. Pre-existing `make security-smoke`, Trivy (removed action pin), and Gitleaks (missing org license) failures are infra/config, unrelated to this work — documented in `docs/commercial-launch/10_COMMERCIAL_LAUNCH_READINESS_REPORT.md`.

## Go / No-Go
- ✅ GO for draft generation · ✅ GO for social/media generation · ✅ GO for founder manual review
- ⛔ NO-GO for automated sending · ⛔ NO-GO for automated posting · ⛔ NO-GO for ad spend
- ⛔ NO-GO for WhatsApp cold outreach · ⛔ NO-GO for LinkedIn automation

## Sample output
`docs/commercial-launch/sample_output/2026-06-04/` — founder_review.md, top_50_priority.md, social_review.md, metrics, safety audit, and truncated queues.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012q2aRrDRL9Rwzydr8DnbSw

commits.messageBody:
Add a complete, review-only Commercial Launch Operating System for the
Saudi/GCC B2B market:

- 5 launch verticals with full playbooks (config + docs)
- SAR offer ladder (6 rungs) with a conservative, no-guarantee claims policy
- 400+/day draft factory (175 cold email + 100 follow-up + 75 LinkedIn manual
  + 50 website form), bilingual AR+EN
- quality + compliance + safety gates; every draft is send_allowed=false /
  external_send_blocked=true / requires_founder_approval=true
- founder daily review bundle (CSV + Markdown + JSONL)
- daily GitHub Actions workflow: no secrets, read-only perms, artifacts only,
  never sends
- engine package, 5 scripts, 4 acceptance test files (29 tests, all pass)
- 11 docs + lightweight committed sample output
- frontend commercial-launch page (typecheck + build pass)
- README/README.ar clone+badge URLs corrected to Dealix-sa/dealix

No SMTP, no API send, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets.
The founder reviews and sends every message manually.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(commercial): launch OS with 400 daily review-only drafts

commits.messageBody:
- drop unused json/Path imports in test_commercial_no_external_send.py
- drop unused vname local in engine._build_subject
commits.messageHeadline: fix(commercial): remove unused imports and variable flagged by CodeQL

commits.messageBody:
… site

- Social & Media OS: daily review-only marketing factory (LinkedIn, X,
  Instagram, newsletter, blog outlines, Google/Meta ad copy with NO spend,
  PR pitches) across 5 verticals + 6 pillars, bilingual AR+EN
- every post: post_allowed=false, external_post_blocked=true,
  requires_founder_approval=true, no_ad_spend=true, status=founder_review
- safety audit extended to scan social_queue.jsonl and posting automation
- readiness gate adds social_os_blocks_posting + social_factory_meets_minimum
- new config/commercial_social.json, dealix/commercial_launch/social.py,
  scripts/commercial_social_factory.py, tests/test_commercial_social_factory.py
- workflow runs the social factory + tests, artifacts only, no secrets
- best-in-class bilingual commercial-launch landing page (Navy+Gold system):
  hero, stats, verticals, SAR ladder, daily loop, Social/Media OS, trust, FAQ
- docs 11_SOCIAL_AND_MEDIA_OS + index/README/readiness updates

No auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no secrets. Review-only throughout.
41 commercial tests pass; web verify passes; readiness 9/9.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(commercial): add review-only Social & Media OS + polished launch…

commits.messageBody:
Use explicit '+' for the multi-line review banner inside the social_review
list literal so CodeQL no longer flags a possible missing comma.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(commercial): make implicit string concatenation explicit (CodeQL)

title: feat(commercial): official Launch OS — 400 daily review-only drafts + Social/Media OS + launch site
